blended.narrative: Cypress Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 399 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
